response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced individual contributor with a strong background in backend and full-stack development, but he lacks the executive leadership, team scaling, and deep fintech/agentic AI architectural experience required for this CTO position. His resume demonstrates a strong engineering craftsman mindset rather than the strategic, organizational, and advanced AI-native system design skills needed for an executive role at a venture-backed scale-up.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed systems experience, including handling high-throughput microservices and asynchronous I/O.
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Demonstrated engineering craftsmanship with a focus on TDD, CI/CD, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks executive-level engineering leadership experience, having primarily worked as an individual contributor (Senior/Staff).
No demonstrated track record of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people or managing external delivery partners.
Missing deep expertise in AI-native fintech infrastructure, specifically algorithmic working-capital management and real-time credit risk.
